sql.query: INSERT INTO tbl_space_configurations (tenantId,spaceId,configurationName,seatedCapacity,standingCapacity,maximumTotalCapacity,isActive) SELECT :tenantId,s.id,:configurationName,NULLIF(:seatedCapacity,''),NULLIF(:standingCapacity,''),NULLIF(:maximumTotalCapacity,''),1 FROM tbl_spaces s WHERE s.id=:spaceId AND s.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND s.isActive=1 LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,afterJson,createdDate) SELECT :tenantId,:userId,'configuration',:entityId,'configuration.created',CONCAT(:actor,' created configuration ',:configurationName,' for ',s.spaceName),JSON_OBJECT('spaceId',s.id,'spaceName',s.spaceName,'locationId',s.locationId,'configurationName',:configurationName2,'seatedCapacity',NULLIF(:seated,''),'standingCapacity',NULLIF(:standing,''),'maximumTotalCapacity',NULLIF(:maximum,''),'isActive',1),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tbl_spaces s WHERE s.id=:spaceId AND s.tenantId=:tenantId2 LIMIT 1
